v1.0.7.0: fix config save — use camelCase for Jellyfin 10.11.x JSON serialization

Jellyfin 10.11.x serializes plugin config as camelCase (tmdbApiKey, not TmdbApiKey).
The settings page was reading/writing PascalCase properties which were always undefined,
causing all settings to silently fail to load and save.

commit.message:
feat: support GITHUB_TOKEN for mining private repo reviews (#5)

The persona miner was making unauthenticated GitHub API calls,
so it could only see public repos. Now picks up GITHUB_TOKEN or
GH_TOKEN from the environment to authenticate, enabling access
to private repos the user has access to.

Adds 79 command guides and 18 DDaT role guides, updates manifest with
full project artifact index, and refreshes the Pages dashboard template.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Poll for ticket generation completion instead of waiting synchronously

POST now returns {status: 'running'} immediately; frontend polls GET
every 6s until status is 'complete'. Fixes Vercel function timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix wardMaxStops returning full line length instead of remaining stops

When a linear line's stations are all within the 23 wards, wardMaxStops
hit the array boundary, broke out of the loop, and returned N-1 (full
line length) instead of i-1 (actual stops to terminus). This caused
rolling ranges like 1-14 on a 4-stop path (e.g. Kugahara → Kamata on
Ikegami Line with 23 Wards enabled).

Also added terminus dedup in getStationsAlongRoute so the route stops
at the last station instead of repeating it if stops somehow exceeds
the actual station count.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add wasm-unsafe-eval to CSP for Shiki code highlighting, fixes #51 (#52)

Shiki's syntax highlighting engine uses WebAssembly for tokenization.
The Content Security Policy in index.html blocked WASM compilation
because script-src only allowed 'self'. Adding 'wasm-unsafe-eval'
permits WebAssembly without enabling general eval().

Co-authored-by: Claude (Autofix) <claude@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: prefer email over id for user resolution to fix FK constraint with stale sessions

Old session tokens (pre email-based ID fix) still carry a random UUID
as session.user.id. Flipping to email-first across all routes ensures
the stable email-based user ID is always used, even with stale JWTs.

commit.message:
Check destination station for transfers before arriving

The transfer check excluded the final destination (route.slice(0, -1)),
so major hubs like Shinjuku would skip straight to "drink here" with no
transfer opportunity. Now all stations including the destination are
checked. At the destination, only a roll of 4 triggers a transfer;
any other roll arrives as before. Die animation shows only 🍺/🔀
(no 🚃 stay) since you can't continue past the last stop.

Fix RCA follow-up UX: prohibit interactive suggestions and add recommendation-based follow-up flow

in recommendations. Add follow-up detection so that when users reply with
"実行してください" etc., the previous RCA recommendations are passed as
context to the next investigation.

commit.message:
refactor: improve codebase quality, DRY, type safety, and testability

- Add src/constants.ts with shared CONFIG_FILENAME/DATA_FILENAME/VALID_LAYOUTS
- Replace manual CLI arg loop with node:util parseArgs + z.enum format validation
- Add try/catch with clear messages in config loader (file read + YAML parse)
- Auto-resolve output.dir to absolute path via .transform() in config schema
- Extract SVG utilities to src/utils/svg.ts; fix normalizeSvg to merge styles
- Add 120s timeout + SIGTERM to Marp CLI subprocess in marp.ts
- Move checkQuality/QualityWarning into quality.ts as single source of truth
- Replace 5x repeated fix-tracking pattern with FixTracker class in auto-fix
- Extract shared ANSI colors (scripts/lib/colors.ts) and spawn wrapper (lib/spawn.ts)
- Refactor category classification: regex → keyword array (scripts/config/categories.ts)
- Add noImplicitReturns/noImplicitOverride/forceConsistentCasingInFileNames to tsconfig
- Add unit tests: slugify, normalizeSvg, quality metrics (25 tests across 3 files)

refactor: codebase improvements — safety, quality, DX

- Remove unused schema fields (includeTableOfContents/Slide/Summary)

- Add scripts/lib/cache.ts for incremental build cache (mtime+size)
- Add --dry-run flag to render and export commands

- Add src/model/presentation.ts thin Presentation model
- Fix validate exit codes: 0=ok, 1=schema errors, 2=quality warnings only
- Fix hasSvg() to be case-insensitive (<SVG> detection)
- Add 4041 unit tests across 7 files (was 3931 across 1)

[Explorer] E100: Add Safe transaction header component with wallet links (#270)

## Summary
This PR introduces a new `SafeTxHeader` component that displays Safe
transaction details with links to Safe Wallet, along with supporting
utilities and refactored transaction data fetching logic.

## Key Changes

- **New `SafeTxHeader` component** (`SafeTxHeader.tsx`): Displays Safe
transaction information including:
  - SafeTxHash with copy button and shortened display
  - Network name and chain ID
  - Safe address with copy button
  - Conditional links to Safe Wallet (transaction and account pages)

- **New utility functions** (`lib/safe/wallet.ts`): Helper functions to
generate Safe Wallet URLs:
  - `safeWalletTxUrl()`: Generates transaction-specific Safe Wallet link
  - `safeWalletSafeUrl()`: Generates Safe account Safe Wallet link

- **New `CopyButton` component** (`components/common/CopyButton.tsx`):
Reusable button for copying values to clipboard with visual feedback
(checkmark confirmation)

- **New `useChainInfo` hook** (`hooks/useChainInfo.ts`): Retrieves chain
information by chain ID from supported Safe Service chains

- **Refactored `useSafeTransactionDetails` hook**: Modified to track the
source of transaction data (Safe API vs on-chain) and return structured
result object with `data`, `fromSafeApi`, and `isFetching` properties.
Simplified logic by removing `findAny` helper in favor of sequential
fallback approach.

- **Updated `safeTx` route**: Replaced `SafeTxOverview` component with
new `SafeTxHeader` component

- **Comprehensive test coverage**: Added unit tests for all new
components and utilities

## Notable Implementation Details

- Safe Wallet links are conditionally shown based on chain support and
data source (transaction link only appears when data comes from Safe
API)
- Copy button provides 2-second visual confirmation feedback
- Chain information lookup gracefully handles unsupported chains by
displaying raw chain ID
- Transaction data fetching now explicitly tracks whether data came from
Safe API or on-chain consensus, enabling source-aware UI behavior

commit.message:
Improve bot ingestion: auto-link profiles, dedup events, smart tagging

app.py:
- Load competitor profiles on startup, auto-set competitor_type on new entries
- Detect duplicate events: same competitor within 3 days gets shared event_id
- Auto-compute tags from content (stablecoin, cards, crypto, payments, etc.)
- Auto-compute importance from competitor threat level + category + funding
- Generate clean_summary (Slack formatting stripped) at ingestion time
- Thread replies now show tier badges [T1], [ECO] and event linking status

detection.py:
- Add domain mappings for Tier 1 competitors from Market PDF
  (Altery, Altitude, Request Finance, Copper x, Kast)
- Add mappings for additional tracked competitors
  (Pomelo, Clara, Phantom, Dakota, Quantoz, etc.)

commit.message:
Rebuild dashboard for competitive intelligence

Redesigned from generic CRUD to purpose-built market intelligence:

- New "Competitive Matrix" tab: 7-dimension comparison table from
  competitors profiles, filterable by tier, with detailed profile cards
- New "Competitor Intel" tab: select competitor -> see profile, threat
  level, funding, all intel entries, timeline, category breakdown
- Redesigned "Overview": threat landscape summary, tier-badged activity
  feed, deduplicated event count
- "Intel Feed" (renamed Data): entries show tier badges, event IDs,
  clean summaries, importance scores
- Updated sidebar: filter by competitor type (tier-1, tier-2, ecosystem, etc.)
- Export tab: download both intel entries and competitor profiles as CSV

Add competitors table with 30 curated profiles and 7-dimension comparison

  Ecosystem (6), Adjacent (6), Emerging (4)

  treasury/yield, market, pricing), funding, valuation, assessment
- Dimensions sourced from Market PDF + database intel entries

commit.message:
M9: Structured Knowledge Representation — retire collections, introduce notebooks

- Replace collection concept with notebook (container) + source (document) model
- Every ingest requires an explicit notebook; no default fallback
- New tools: knowledge_notebook_create, knowledge_notebook_list, knowledge_notebook_delete
- Renamed: knowledge_list_collections → knowledge_notebook_list
- All tool params updated: collection → notebook throughout
- Store layer: CollectionInfo → NotebookInfo, list_collections → list_notebooks, new delete_notebook
- Pipeline: IngestResult.collection → notebook, matching pipeline function renames
- Status now reports notebook_count
- Migration script: scripts/migrate_collection_to_notebook.py (no-op on empty DB)
- Steering file: ~/.claude/steering/knowledge.md with command interface and notebook protocol
- Deploy script: replace sleep 3 with retry loop (10 × 2s)
- README: update features + MCP tools table, add Usage Scenarios section
- All 53 unit tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: QR Check-in — самостоятельная отметка без оборудования
